testcase.name: testGetAffiliateTradeList
testcase.system-out: [2026-06-09 14:56:51] [RequestID: 49b3d44545f49dcc] [GET] https://api-cloud.bmexchangeaws-test.com/contract/private/affiliate/trade-list?user_id=1234567&type=1&page=1&size=50&start_time=1770739200&end_time=1771257600 RequestHeader: Array ( [Content-Type] => application/json [User-Agent] => bitmart-php-sdk-api/2.4.0 [X-BM-KEY] => a0a053a31cca9346e52844ee3f13eaa9867c4a51 ) [2026-06-09 14:56:51] [RequestID: 49b3d44545f49dcc] --Response {"msg":"User does not exist","errno":"invalidUserId","code":40025,"success":false,"requestId":"f30e03acbac94d3a9d12e2f574fc743c"} ----------------------------
